stemHtml: What are the four sleep-related processes that affect the level of performance?

options.a: Circadian Rhythm, Homeostatic Sleep Drive, Insomnia, and Sleepiness.
options.b: Sleep Regulation, Elevated Sleep Drive, Desynchronisation, and Sleep Inertia.
options.c: Sleep Regulation, Sleep Apnoea, Diurnal Synchronisation, and Sleep Drive.
options.d: Sleep Inertia, Sleep Latency, Sleep Regulation, and Sleep Apnoea.
